kennelTipLean.note: The forum's bracing for a hiding. Couple of brave 'turning point' calls but most reckon Storm could hang 50 on us the way we're playing.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: Either this is the turning point of our season or we cop a 50 point drubbing. No in between. — Moedogg

debates.question: Salmon's named at 13 — does he last the full 80 there?
debates.kennel: The 'Tracey, Salmon and Hayward MUST be dropped' thread reckons he's stifling everything in the middle.

options.label: Yes, plays out the full 80 at lock
Gets hooked for Mann or Hayes mid-game
Shifted to the edge, Preston or Tupouniua moves in

debates.question: Who's the first middle forward off the bench?
debates.kennel: Bench rotation's been a mess and the gameday thread wants Mann and Hayes used earlier.

trivia.question: Who holds the Bulldogs' record for most first-grade games for the club?
trivia.explainer: Terry Lamb played 349 games for Canterbury between 1984 and 1996 — still the all-time club record.

recap.question: Who racked up the most run metres for the Dogs against the Sharks?
recap.explainer: Tuala led the Dogs with 216 run metres and also bagged 2 line breaks — one of the few bright spots in a 38-16 loss.

washup.headline: Cooked at Suncorp and the season's hanging by a thread.
washup.vibe: 38-16 to the Sharks and it wasn't even that close — 35 missed tackles tells you everything. Tuala was electric on the edge, Preston worked his arse off, but the spine couldn't string two sets together. We're 14th, the Storm are 13th, and Friday is genuinely the most important game of the year already.
washup.kennelSummary: The Kennel's gone past angry into resigned. Salmon, Hayward and Tracey are getting absolutely roasted, Ciraldo's job thread cracked 500 replies, and there's a growing camp blaming Gus for chopping and changing the roster every five minutes.

kennelHotTakes.quote: Shit coach, shit spine, shit backs, shit front row, shit lock. Other than that, we're sweet.
kennelHotTakes.author: SARGE

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Round 12 Dogs vs Storm Friday 8pm
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Gameday thread is split between Bulldog John calling Dogs by 10 as the turning point and Moedogg openly preparing for a 50-point pasting. Plenty of chat about who should get dropped before kickoff.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: What are your theories on why we have regressed so much this year?
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Big post-mortem thread. Dogmonster's list of grievances (losing Reed, Sexton, Addo-Carr, Jason Taylor) is getting traction, with BulldogsNation blaming the spine for breaking down every overlap.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: CIRALDOS JOB FUTURE
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: 500 replies of pure heat. Pro-CC camp led by Johnnny2233 pointing to two finals series, while others reckon Gus's short fuse means the coach is one bad loss from gone.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: The Talk of Sexton is better than Galvin is over after this
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Sparked by Sexton's botched kickoff for Perth. Chemdog's still arguing we were top of the ladder with Sexton and have regressed since signing Galvin, the rest of the thread piles on him.
